title: He was having a mental health crisis. Memphis task force agents came and shot him
description: Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigations agent in May. There have been at least four deadly shootings related to the task force.

title: Maine Democrats scramble to select replacement for Platner in Senate race
description: Maine Democrats now have a process for choosing a replacement for Senate candidate Graham Platner. But voters are still reeling from his fall.

title: Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows on her bid to replace Platner in Senate race
description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows about her run to replace Graham Platner in the Maine Senate race.

title: Former member of federal Election Assistance Commission speaks out after dismissal
description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Benjamin Hovland, one of three members of the Election Assistance Commission fired last week by President Trump.

title: Congress returns to Washington this week
description: Congress returns from recess this week to face the sudden loss of a senator, a lengthy to-do list and limited time.

title: Jubilee Media helps politicians connect with young people through viral debate videos
description: Jubilee Media produces some of the most watched content on YouTube. That includes the show "Surrounded," which has increasingly become a stop for politicians hoping to make inroads with young viewers.

title: McConnell says a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking weeks of silence
description: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health.

title: Lindsey Graham died of aortic dissection, preliminary medical report says
description: Graham died hours after returning from a trip to Ukraine. Trump said he spoke with the senator Saturday evening and that “could’ve been his last call.”

title: Former Senator Jeff Flake remembers his colleague and friend Lindsay Graham
description: Former Republican Senator Jeff Flake served in congress alongside Lindsay Graham from 2013-2019. Despite moments of tension and disagreement, he says he and Sen. Graham were "friends to the end."

title: How longtime GOP Senator Lindsey Graham went from critic to ally of President Trump
description: Longtime Republican Sen. Lindsey Graham has died at the age of 71. The foreign policy hawk and former critic-turned-ally of President Trump was running for re-election in South Carolina.

title: Politics chat: Lindsey Graham dies at 71, Congress back in session, U.S. strikes Iran
description: South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden death at 71 has shocked Washington. Once a fierce critic of then-candidate Donald Trump, he became one of the president's most consistent defenders.
